title: erica bruniifolia var. stellata
intro: Erica bruniifolia var. stellata, also known as the Stella Heather, is a shrubby perennial plant belonging to the heath family, Ericaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant's health benefits include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory function, and exhibit antimicrobial activities. Erica bruniifolia var. stellata can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in herbal medicine to support lung health and relieve respiratory discomfort.
